# Locator registry for {{domain}} domain
# Generated by: cli generate:domain
# 
# This file defines UI element locators for the {{domain}} domain.
# Locators are organized by page and component.

{{domain}}:
  {{domainPage}}:
    mainContainer:
      selector: '[data-testid="{{domain}}-container"]'
      strategy: data-testid
      description: 'Main container for {{domain}} page'
      timeout: 5000
    
    actionButton:
      selector: '[data-testid="{{domain}}-action-btn"]'
      strategy: data-testid
      description: 'Primary action button on {{domain}} page'
      timeout: 3000
    
    # TODO: Add more locators for {{domain}} domain
    # Example:
    # inputField:
    #   selector: '[data-testid="{{domain}}-input"]'
    #   strategy: data-testid
    #   description: 'Input field for {{domain}}'
    #   timeout: 3000
